scripts.test:router: npm run build && npm run build:test-modules && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/router.test.ts tests/templates.test.ts tests/router-local-llm.test.ts tests/footer.test.ts tests/compressor.test.ts tests/context-pack.test.ts tests/pr-diff.test.ts tests/cache.test.ts tests/quality.test.ts tests/prompt-order.test.ts tests/file-focus.test.ts tests/repo-lookup.test.ts tests/audit.test.ts tests/cost-gates.test.ts tests/budget.test.ts
scripts.test:router:live: npm run build && npm run build:test-modules && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/router-live-llm.test.ts tests/compressor-live.ts tests/e2e-proof.ts
